raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Private hospital corporations have an obligation to provide critically needed inpatient psychiatric and perinatal services.",
    "SB 1300 will provide ample notice for service reductions to the surrounding community.",
    "SB 1300 ensures that private hospital corporations are held accountable and remain transparent during the process of service reduction.",
    "By requiring private hospital corporations to disclose service reduction information, public health systems will be better prepared to absorb the loss of services.",
    "The extended notice period provided by SB 1300 can improve comprehensive planning and public awareness regarding service closures.",
    "California hospitals are closing labor and delivery services at a significantly higher rate than the rest of the country."
  ]
}
```
